input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-129d78833fb64e439f7c8c20001e6760 && dotnet build -c Debug -bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG BUILD DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release -bl:release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE BUILD DONE---"

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. The binlog files are ready:

- **`debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build log
- **`release.binlog`** — Release configuration build log

You can inspect them with `dotnet build-server` or the [MSBuild Binary Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
